endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Storage.Admin/farms/{farmId}/shares/operationresults/{operationId}
endpoints.description: Returns the status of a container migration job.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{FARMID}} with a real farmid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{OPERATIONID}} with a real operationid.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Storage.Admin/farms/{farmId}/shares/operationresults/{operationId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{FARMID}} with a real farmid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{OPERATIONID}} with a real operationid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Storage.Admin/farms/{farmId}/shares/{shareName}/containers
endpoints.description: Returns the list of containers which can be migrated in the specified share.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SHARENAME}} with a real sharename. Replace {{FARMID}} with a real farmid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Storage.Admin/farms/{farmId}/shares/{shareName}/destinationshares
endpoints.description: Returns a list of destination shares that the system considers as best candidates for migration.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SHARENAME}} with a real sharename. Replace {{FARMID}} with a real farmid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Storage.Admin/farms/{farmId}/shares/{shareName}/migrate
endpoints.description: Starts a container migration job to migrate containers to the specified destination share.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SHARENAME}} with a real sharename. Replace {{FARMID}} with a real farmid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
